text: Two files found in the etcd-io/etcd repo. (1) server/mvcc/kvstore.go defines ErrCompacted at line 39 with the exact error string 'mvcc: required revision has been compacted'. (2) server/mvcc/kvstore_txn.go defines the rangeKeys method (line 128) on storeTxnRead, which returns ErrCompacted at line 137 when the requested revision is less than the compacted main revision. Other ErrCompacted variables exist (raft/storage.go, api/v3rpc/rpctypes/error.go, server/proxy/grpcproxy/cache/store.go) but those are either for different error messages or re-exports of gRPC error types, not the authoritative mvcc definition.
